locale_profile.note: Korean (`values-ko`) is a standard Korean localization for Android UI, playback, and signal-visualization text.
locale_profile.identity_rule: Treat this locale as contemporary Korean UI localization. Avoid literal English word order in strings about playback speed, input rules, byte counts, token lyrics, and low/high bit visualization. Preserve WaveBits protocol tokens such as mini, flash, pro, ultra, ASCII, UTF-8, Hex, Binary, Morse, Hz, payload, token, byte, and nibble when the existing Korean locale keeps them as technical terms.
locale_profile.app_text_rule: For app UI text, keep labels concise enough for Android buttons, tabs, segmented controls, mini-player sheets, sliders, and narrow cards. Follow existing project terms where present: 오디오, 자, 바이트, 입력 규칙, 토큰, 니블, 페이로드, 낮은 캐리어, 높은 캐리어, 레인, 에너지, and 피치. Use compact Korean labels rather than full explanatory sentences for controls and mode chips. Keep protocol tokens and ASCII/UTF-8/Morse terms stable.
locale_profile.sample_text_rule: For built-in sample prose, preserve the dramatic audio-signal atmosphere while writing fluent Korean. Keep pro-mode sample strings strict ASCII when the key or context says pro/ASCII.
locale_profile.key_alignment_rule: When filling missing entries, write Korean localization that matches the current XML terminology. Avoid English-like sentence structure unless the string is intentionally a protocol token or fixed ASCII sample. For missing compact input summaries, preserve placeholders and mirror the established counter pattern around `%1$d자 • %2$d바이트`.

entries.name: audio_sample_exquisite_fall_themed_velvet_barbs_kiss
entries.context: This file contains localized themed sample text for flash/ultra. Shared Pro ASCII protocol samples live in audio_samples_pro_ascii_shared.xml and are not localized.
entries.en: Velvet hides the barbs; with every caress, the self forgets its boundaries.
entries.localized: 벨벳은 가시를 감춘다. 어루만짐이 한 번 스칠 때마다 자아는 자기 경계를 잊어버린다.

entries.name: audio_sample_exquisite_fall_themed_self_dissolves_in_touch
entries.en: Silk drinks sweat and blood until both gleam as one. Familiar whispers brush against the ear, soft enough to trust, sharp enough to cut. Every touch strikes like lightning. Pain and pleasure trade names, then lose them altogether. At the summit of delight, the soul is not held; it shatters into sensation, and every fragment thanks the abyss for its embrace.
entries.localized: 실크는 땀과 피를 집어삼켜 둘을 하나의 광택으로 뒤엉키게 한다. 익숙한 속삭임은 귀를 핥듯 스치고, 믿고 싶을 만큼 부드럽다가도 살을 가를 만큼 예리해진다. 모든 접촉은 번개처럼 내리꽂힌다. 고통과 쾌락은 이름을 바꿔 달고, 끝내 그 이름마저 토해낸다. 환희의 정상에서 영혼은 붙들리지 않는다. 감각의 파편으로 산산이 부서지고, 그 조각마다 자기를 삼킨 심연의 포옹을 찬양한다.

entries.name: audio_sample_exquisite_fall_themed_soft_moss_says_enough
entries.context: This file contains localized themed sample text for flash/ultra. Shared Pro ASCII protocol samples live in audio_samples_pro_ascii_shared.xml and are not localized.
entries.en: The moss cradles every ache, whispering that you have done enough.
entries.localized: 이끼는 모든 쑤심을 요람처럼 감싸며 이제 충분하다고 속삭인다.

entries.name: audio_sample_exquisite_fall_themed_lullaby_closes_the_eyes
entries.en: The meadow is warm with a holy light. Moss receives the body as if it had studied every burden. Vines take the weapon gently, not as chains, but as permission to let it fall. A lullaby washes over every scar and declares each struggle finished. There are no commands here. Only kindness. Rest for a moment. Let your eyes close. Let them forget how to open.
entries.localized: 초원은 성스러운 빛으로 미지근하게 끓는다. 이끼는 네 몸을 받아들이되 네 짐의 결까지 미리 암기한 연인처럼 스며든다. 덩굴은 무기를 사슬처럼 빼앗지 않는다. 떨어뜨려도 된다고 허락하는 손길로 감겨든다. 자장가는 흉터마다 스며들어 모든 투쟁이 끝났다고 선언한다. 이곳에는 명령이 없다. 다만 과잉의 자비만 있다. 잠시 쉬어라. 눈을 감아라. 다시 뜨는 법을 잊어버려라.

entries.name: audio_sample_exquisite_fall_themed_crown_too_heavy
entries.context: This file contains localized themed sample text for flash/ultra. Shared Pro ASCII protocol samples live in audio_samples_pro_ascii_shared.xml and are not localized.
entries.en: The crown breaks the neck, yet the ruler smiles beneath its weight.
entries.localized: 왕관은 목을 꺾는데도 지배자는 그 무게 아래에서 웃는다.

entries.name: audio_sample_exquisite_fall_themed_dream_throne_commands_all
entries.en: The hall answers with ten thousand throats. Subjects and enemies kneel in identical rows, and the throne rises from rival skulls, shattered steel, and endless praise. Every command becomes law before its echo dies. Reality waits outside, torn and pleading, but why serve it when the dream is flawless? The crown is heavy because humility was its price, and that price was gladly paid.
entries.localized: 전당은 만 개의 목구멍으로 화답한다. 신하와 적은 같은 줄에 무릎을 꿇고, 옥좌는 라이벌의 해골과 산산난 강철, 끝없는 찬미 위로 솟아오른다. 모든 명령은 메아리가 죽기 전에 법이 된다. 현실은 바깥에서 찢긴 채 애원하지만, 꿈이 이토록 무결한데 어째서 현실을 섬기겠는가. 왕관이 무거운 까닭은 겸손을 대가로 바쳤기 때문이고, 그 대가는 기꺼이 지불되었다.

entries.name: audio_sample_exquisite_fall_themed_gold_dust_inhaled
entries.context: This file contains localized themed sample text for flash/ultra. Shared Pro ASCII protocol samples live in audio_samples_pro_ascii_shared.xml and are not localized.
entries.en: Gold dust fills the lungs, yet the hands still reach for more.
entries.localized: 금가루가 폐를 메워도 손은 더 많은 것을 향해 뻗는다.

entries.name: audio_sample_exquisite_fall_themed_vault_without_enough
entries.en: Coins pile in feverish heaps, casting a sickly light over the vault. Diamonds rain from the ceiling. A white bone hand snaps under bracelets too heavy to bear, while a living collector turns to gold from the fingertips inward. He gasps through glittering dust. He owns rooms, crowns, names, and keys, yet his only remaining thought is the agony of not owning everything.
entries.localized: 동전은 열병처럼 쌓여 금고를 병든 빛으로 물들인다. 천장에서는 다이아몬드가 비처럼 떨어진다. 감당할 수 없는 팔찌 아래에서 백골 같은 손이 부러지고, 살아 있는 수집가는 손끝부터 안쪽으로 황금이 되어 굳어간다. 그는 반짝이는 먼지를 들이마시며 헐떡인다. 방과 왕관과 이름과 열쇠를 모두 쥐고도, 남은 생각은 단 하나다. 전부를 소유하지 못한 고통.

entries.name: audio_sample_exquisite_fall_themed_mirror_keeps_perfection
entries.context: This file contains localized themed sample text for flash/ultra. Shared Pro ASCII protocol samples live in audio_samples_pro_ascii_shared.xml and are not localized.
entries.en: The mirror reflects perfection; any movement would only mar it.
entries.localized: 거울은 완벽만 비춘다. 움직임은 그 표면을 더럽힐 뿐이다.

entries.name: audio_sample_exquisite_fall_themed_statue_of_self_praise
entries.en: Crystal mirrors repeat the flawless face until the world has no room left. Ghosts sing softly of victories that may never have happened. A scratch on the armor matters more than the blade that made it. The perfect pose is held for a breath, then an hour, then forever. Flesh cools into a monument. The admirer and the idol become the same silent stone.
entries.localized: 수정 거울은 세상에 빈틈이 사라질 때까지 무결한 얼굴을 반복해 토해낸다. 유령들은 존재했는지조차 불분명한 승리를 낮게 읊조린다. 갑옷의 흠집 하나가 그 흠집을 낸 칼날보다 더 소중해진다. 완벽한 포즈는 한 호흡에서 한 시간으로, 그리고 영원으로 굳어간다. 육체는 식어 기념비가 되고, 숭배자와 우상은 마침내 같은 결의 침묵하는 돌로 합쳐진다.

entries.name: audio_sample_exquisite_fall_themed_sweet_meat_never_ends
entries.context: This file contains localized themed sample text for flash/ultra. Shared Pro ASCII protocol samples live in audio_samples_pro_ascii_shared.xml and are not localized.
entries.en: The sweet meat slowly spoils; the mouth opens again.
entries.localized: 달콤한 살점이 천천히 썩어도 입은 다시 벌어진다.

entries.name: audio_sample_exquisite_fall_themed_banquet_eats_the_tongue
entries.en: The feast smells of perfume, rot, spice, and vomit. Amethyst wine flows like liquid light, and the diners keep swallowing even as their bellies split. Dignity is gone. Speech is gone. Even the tongue is chewed away in search of a purer taste. Fullness is an insult, a locked door within the body. Bite through it. Drink past it. Let appetite become the only organ left.
entries.localized: 연회는 향수와 썩은 내장 냄새, 향신료와 구토의 냄새가 한데 뒤엉켜 끓는다. 자수정 포도주는 액체 빛처럼 흐르고, 만찬객들은 배가 갈라지는 순간까지 삼키기를 멈추지 않는다. 품위는 사라진다. 언어도 사라진다. 더 순수한 맛을 찾아 혀마저 씹어 집어삼킨다. 포만은 모욕이다. 육체 안쪽에 걸린 자물쇠다. 그 문을 물어뜯어라. 그 한계를 넘어 마셔라. 식욕만이 마지막 장기가 되게 하라.

style_profile.prompt_text:
# KO Sample Style: The Exquisite Fall

Use this profile only for `sample_text`, locale `ko`, group `exquisite_fall`.

Core persona:
Extreme hedonism, sensory overload, pathological perfectionism, and dissolving selfhood.
Pain is treated as ecstasy, and luxury is pushed to a nauseating edge.

1. Register requirements
- Never use polite endings (`-습니다/-요`).
- Narrative should stay in literary declarative style (`-다/-ㄴ다`) with dark-fantasy / decadent cadence.
- For lure/command lines, use strong imperatives (`-라/-아라/-어라`) like hypnotic cult whispers.

2. Collision rhetoric
- Preserve and amplify contrast between beauty/luxury and disgust/pain.
- Keep pairings sharp: perfume vs vomit, silk vs blood, diamond vs white bone.
- The line should feel like “repulsive beauty” rather than plain horror.

3. Verb preference (visceral and adhesive)
- Avoid neutral verbs when bodily action is central.
- Prefer intense tactile verbs:
  - eat/swallow -> `집어삼키다`
  - bite -> `물어뜯다`
  - mix/intertwine -> `뒤엉키다`

4. Emotional tone
- Keep the tone intoxicated, not frightened or pitying.
- When bodies collapse from excess pleasure, voice should remain admiring, envious, or ecstatic.
- Maintain a romantic self-destruction mood.
